title: ClientGames
description:
Need to fill some time? Have some fun?
Time to play some games?
body:
## How to open games
> Use: `/clientgames <Name of the game>`

## List of included Games
- Minesweeper
- Snake
- Flappy Bird

---
## Features per game
- Minesweeper
  - Saving and loading state (automatically)
  - Adding flags
  - Reveal all on fail
  - Adjustable Width, Height, Amount of mines
- Snake
  - Very basic
  - Arrow keys to control the snake
- Flappy Bird
  - Smooth rendering
  - Exactly what you'd expect
